User.title: User
User.description: Represents a customer profile in the Pehnava by Neha platform. Used for authentication and personalization.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

phone.description: The customer's primary phone number, used for login and WhatsApp communication. (Example: +919876543210)

name.description: The full name of the customer.

birthdayMonth.description: The month of the customer's birthday (1-12).

birthdayYear.description: The year of the customer's birthday.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

OtpCode.title: OtpCode
OtpCode.description: Stores one-time passcodes sent to users for authentication via WhatsApp.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OtpCode entity.

phone.description: The phone number to which the OTP was sent, matching a User's phone number.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the OTP code expires.

used.description: Indicates whether the OTP code has been successfully used for authentication.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Represents a saved delivery address for a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Address entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this address. (Relationship: User 1:N Address)

name.description: The full name of the recipient for this address.

line1.description: The first line of the street address.

line2.description: The second line of the street address, if any.

state.description: The state or province of the address.

pincode.description: The postal code or pincode of the address.

isDefault.description: Indicates if this is the user's default delivery address.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The display name of the category (e.g., 'Sarees').

slug.description: A URL-friendly unique identifier for the category (e.g., 'sarees').

parentId.description: Reference to a parent category, enabling hierarchical categorization. (Relationship: Category 1:N Category)

imageUrl.description: URL to an image representing the category.

displayOrder.description: The order in which the category should be displayed.

Collection.title: Collection
Collection.description: Groups products for marketing or thematic purposes (e.g., 'New Arrivals', 'Wedding Collection').

id.description: Unique identifier for the Collection entity.

name.description: The display name of the collection (e.g., 'Festive Collection').

slug.description: A URL-friendly unique identifier for the collection (e.g., 'festive-collection').

description.description: A brief description of the collection.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image representing the collection.

productIds.description: References to Products included in this collection. (Relationship: Collection N:N Product)

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single sellable item available in the boutique.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

slug.description: A URL-friendly unique identifier for the product (e.g., 'silk-saree-red').

fabric.description: The fabric material of the product.

careInstructions.description: Instructions for caring for the product (e.g., 'Dry Clean Only').

price.description: The original selling price of the product.

salePrice.description: The discounted sale price of the product, if applicable.

categoryId.description: Reference to the primary Category this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Product)

stockStatus.description: Current stock availability status of the product.

published.description: Indicates if the product is visible on the storefront.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog.

collectionIds.description: References to Collections this product belongs to. (Relationship: Product N:N Collection)

ProductImage.title: ProductImage
ProductImage.description: Stores image URLs for a specific product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductImage entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product this image belongs to. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductImage)

url.description: The URL of the product image.

displayOrder.description: The order in which the image should be displayed in the product gallery.

ProductVariant.title: ProductVariant
ProductVariant.description: Defines specific variations of a product, such as size and color, along with their stock quantity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductVariant entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product this variant belongs to. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductVariant)

size.description: The size of the product variant (e.g., 'M', 'XL').

colorName.description: The name of the color of the product variant (e.g., 'Crimson Red').

colorHex.description: The hexadecimal color code for the product variant (e.g., '#8B1A3A').

stockQty.description: The current quantity of this specific product variant in stock.

WishlistItem.title: WishlistItem
WishlistItem.description: Represents a single product added to a user's wishlist.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WishlistItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who added the item to their wishlist. (Relationship: User 1:N WishlistItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product in the wishlist. (Relationship: Product 1:N WishlistItem)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the wishlist.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's placed order, including details about delivery, payment, and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed the order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

name.description: The full name of the recipient for the order.

phone.description: The phone number for delivery contact.

addressJson.description: A JSON string representation of the delivery address at the time of order placement. This field captures the address details as they were, independently of any changes to a saved Address entity. It is a string to prevent nesting of objects.

subtotal.description: The sum of prices of all items in the order before delivery charges and discounts.

deliveryCharge.description: The delivery charge applied to the order.

total.description: The total amount paid or to be paid for the order, including all charges.

paymentStatus.description: The current status of the payment for this order (e.g., 'PENDING', 'CONFIRMED').

orderStatus.description: The current fulfillment status of the order (e.g., 'PACKED', 'SHIPPED').

paymentScreenshotUrl.description: URL to the screenshot uploaded by the customer as proof of UPI payment.

courierName.description: The name of the courier service used for shipping.

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number provided by the courier service.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the order status or details.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Details a specific product included within an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product that was ordered. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

productName.description: The name of the product at the time of order.

productImage.description: The URL of the product's main image at the time of order.

size.description: The size of the product ordered.

color.description: The color of the product ordered.

price.description: The price of a single unit of the product at the time of order.

quantity.description: The quantity of this product ordered.

HomepageConfig.title: HomepageConfig
HomepageConfig.description: Stores dynamic configuration data for the website homepage, such as banners and featured products.

key.description: A unique key identifying the homepage configuration item (e.g., 'hero_banners', 'featured_products').

valueJson.description: A JSON string representing the configuration value for the given key. This field stores complex data structures as a string to prevent nesting of objects.

Setting.title: Setting
Setting.description: Stores global application settings and configuration values.

key.description: A unique key identifying the application setting (e.g., 'upi_id', 'delivery_charge').

definition.description: Stores individual customer profiles. Access is restricted to the authenticated user themselves and administrators.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching request.auth.uid.
